name: reddit-mcp-server
description: Scrape Reddit and Facebook groups (public & private) and build Schwartz 'Breakthrough Advertising' customer personas - directly from Claude.
long_description:
An e-commerce customer-research MCP server. It scrapes real customer discussions from Reddit AND Facebook groups, then turns them into customer personas using Eugene Schwartz's 'Breakthrough Advertising' framework.

**Reddit (read + write):**
- Browse/search any subreddit, fetch posts with threaded comments
- User profiles, trending subreddits
- Create, reply, edit, delete (with credentials) + Safe Mode spam protection

**Facebook (scraping):**
- Scrape posts from PUBLIC and PRIVATE Facebook groups (private groups need a logged-in session cookie from a member)
- Scrape comment threads from posts
- Group metadata, group search, public Page feeds
- Lightweight HTTP engine by default; optional Playwright browser engine for private groups and full comment threads

**Customer personas (Schwartz framework):**
- Mine discussions into voice-of-customer buckets: pains, desires, objections, questions, emotional triggers, verbatim quotes
- Build a persona brief organized by mass desire, the 5 awareness stages, and the 5 market-sophistication levels
- Works on Reddit, Facebook, or both

**Perfect for:**
- E-commerce brands and DTC marketers
- Customer/audience research and ad copywriting
- Market and competitor analysis

reddit_client_id.title: Reddit Client ID
reddit_client_id.description: Your Reddit app client ID (optional - increases rate limit to 60 req/min)

reddit_client_secret.title: Reddit Client Secret
reddit_client_secret.description: Your Reddit app client secret (required with client ID)

reddit_username.title: Reddit Username
reddit_username.description: Your Reddit username (required for write operations and 100 req/min)

reddit_password.title: Reddit Password
reddit_password.description: Your Reddit password (required for write operations)

reddit_safe_mode.title: Safe Mode
reddit_safe_mode.description: Spam protection level: off, standard (default), or strict

reddit_bot_disclosure.title: Bot Disclosure
reddit_bot_disclosure.description: Bot disclosure footer: auto or off (default)

reddit_bot_footer.title: Bot Footer
reddit_bot_footer.description: Custom bot footer text (used with bot disclosure = auto)

facebook_cookie.title: Facebook Cookie
facebook_cookie.description: Full Cookie header from a logged-in facebook.com browser (must include c_user and xs). Required to scrape private groups you belong to.

facebook_engine.title: Facebook Engine
facebook_engine.description: Scraping engine: auto (default), http (lightweight), or browser (Playwright; best for private groups)

facebook_min_delay_ms.title: Facebook Request Delay (ms)
facebook_min_delay_ms.description: Minimum delay between Facebook requests for anti-bot pacing (default 4000)

facebook_headless.title: Facebook Headless Browser
facebook_headless.description: Run the Playwright browser engine headless: true (default) or false
